mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SmnrDAO.mrkRfltSmnrList 설 명 : 성적반영세미나목록 */ SELECT SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND SMNR_TYCD = 'EDU_SMNR' AND UP_SMNR_ID IS NULL AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : SmnrDAO.smnrTrgtAtndlcUserList 설 명 : 세미나대상수강생목록 */ SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID , USR.USERNM , TEAM.TEAM_ID , SMNR.SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR SMNR JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC ON SMNR.SBJCT_ID = ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ATNDLC.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SMNR_TEAM.SMNR_ID , SMNR_TEAM.TEAM_ID , TEAM_MBR.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_TEAM SMNR_TEAM JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR ON SMNR_TEAM.TEAM_ID = TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID ) TEAM ON TEAM.SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID AND TEAM.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE SMNR.DELYN = 'N' AND ( (SMNR.BYTEAM_SUBSMNR_USEYN = 'N' AND SMNR.SMNR_ID = #{smnrId} AND TEAM.TEAM_ID IS NULL) OR (SMNR.BYTEAM_SUBSMNR_USEYN = 'Y' AND SMNR.UP_SMNR_ID = #{smnrId} AND TEAM.TEAM_ID IS NOT NULL) )

/* SQL ID : SmnrDAO.smnrSelect 설 명 : 세미나조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMNR SMNR ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SMNR.SBJCT_ID AND SMNR.SMNR_ID = #{smnrId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ), SUB_SMNR AS ( SELECT SMNR_ID, UP_SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND UP_SMNR_ID IS NOT NULL ) SELECT SMNR.SMNR_ID , SMNR.SMNRNM , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(SMNR.SMNR_CTS, 4000, 1) AS SMNR_CTS , SMNR.SMNR_TYCD , SMNR.SMNR_SDTTM , SMNR.SMNR_EDTTM , SMNR.SMNR_MNTS , SMNR.SMNR_GBNCD , SMNR.AUTO_RCDYN , SMNR.SBJCT_ID , SMNR.UP_SMNR_ID , SMNR.EVL_SCR_TYCD , SMNR.MRK_RFLTYN , SMNR.MRK_RFLTRT , SMNR.MRK_OYN , SMNR.BYTEAM_SUBSMNR_USEYN , SMNR.ATND_RCD_PFLTYN , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = SMNR.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , (SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SMNR.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCTNM , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SUB_SMNR SS WHERE SS.UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID) THEN 'SMNR_TEAM' ELSE 'SMNR' END AS SMNR_GBN , (SELECT DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SMNR.SBJCT_ID) AS DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM SBJCT_USER) AS SMNR_TRGT_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ATND.SMNR_ATND_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_ATND ATND WHERE ATND.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) AND ATND.SMNR_ID IN ( SELECT SS.SMNR_ID FROM SUB_SMNR SS WHERE SS.UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID UNION ALL SELECT SMNR.SMNR_ID FROM DUAL ) ) AS SMNR_ATND_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ATND.SMNR_ATND_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_ATND ATND WHERE ATND.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) AND ATND.ATND_EVLYN = 'Y' AND ATND.SMNR_ID IN ( SELECT SS.SMNR_ID FROM SUB_SMNR SS WHERE SS.UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID UNION ALL SELECT SMNR.SMNR_ID FROM DUAL ) ) AS SMNR_EVLTEE_CNT , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_TEAM WHERE SMNR_ID = (SELECT SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR WHERE UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = SMNR.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR_TEAM WHERE SMNR_ID = (SELECT SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR WHERE UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1)))) LRN_GRPNM , NVL((SELECT SMNR_ID FROM SUB_SMNR WHERE UP_SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID AND ROWNUM = 1), SMNR.SMNR_ID) AS SUB_SMNR_ID , (SELECT MEETNGRM_ID FROM TB_LMS_ONLN_MEETNGRM WHERE SMNR_ID = SMNR.SMNR_ID) AS MEETNGRM_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR SMNR WHERE SMNR_ID = #{smnrId}

/* SQL ID : SmnrDAO.smnrLrnGrpSubSmnrList 설 명 : 세미나학습그룹부세미나목록조회 */ SELECT TEAM.TEAM_ID , TEAM.TEAMNM , NVL((SELECT USR.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER USR JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR ON USR.USER_ID = TEAM_MBR.USER_ID WHERE TEAM_MBR.LDRYN = 'Y' AND TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID), '-') AS LEADERNM , (SELECT COUNT(tlts.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR tlts WHERE tlts.TEAM_ID = TEAM.TEAM_ID) AS TEAM_MBR_CNT , SUB_SMNR.SMNRNM , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(SUB_SMNR.SMNR_CTS, 4000, 1) AS SMNR_CTS FROM TB_LMS_TEAM TEAM LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMNR_TEAM SMNR_TEAM ON TEAM.TEAM_ID = SMNR_TEAM.TEAM_ID AND SMNR_TEAM.SMNR_ID IN (SELECT SMNR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SMNR WHERE UP_SMNR_ID = #{smnrId}) LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMNR SUB_SMNR ON SMNR_TEAM.SMNR_ID = SUB_SMNR.SMNR_ID AND SUB_SMNR.DELYN = 'N' AND SUB_SMNR.UP_SMNR_ID = #{smnrId} WHERE TEAM.LRN_GRP_ID = #{lrnGrpId} ORDER BY TEAM.TEAM_ID ASC
